# Assurity Enterprise Group (AEG)

> Life insurance and annuity education and applications. Site: https://www.aeginsurance.com

## Summary

AEG (Assurity Enterprise Group) publishes plain-language guides on life insurance and annuities, offers contact/quote flows, and hosts a full life insurance application. Content is educational; products and availability vary by state and carrier.

## Authoritative pages

- https://www.aeginsurance.com/
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/life-insurance
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/annuities
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/blog
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/about
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/contact
- https://www.aeginsurance.com/apply

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://www.aeginsurance.com/sitemap.xml
